user.description: Enter your Lepro account email to look up your regional server.

data_description.account: The email address associated with your Lepro account.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Lepro service. Check your account email and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Lepro account is already configured.
abort.oauth_error: An error occurred during OAuth authorization.
abort.oauth_timeout: Timed out waiting for OAuth authorization.
abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Please follow the documentation.

application_credentials.description: Enter your Lepro OAuth2 client ID and client secret. You can obtain these from your Lepro developer account.
